title: oxycoccus oxycoccos
intro: Oxycoccus oxycoccos, also known as bilberry, is a type of shrub native to acidic bogs and heathlands in Northern Europe and North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxycoccus oxycoccos include improved heart health, reduced risk of age-related macular degeneration, and enhanced cognitive function. Bilberry extract is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and jams, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and is also used in topical applications like creams and salves.
